name: Convex Hull Trick (DP Optimization)
description: Optimize DP transitions of the form dp[j] = min over i<j of (dp[i] + b[i]*x[j]) from O(n²) to O(n) by maintaining a convex hull of lines.
intuition: Each state i defines a line y = b[i]*x + dp[i]. The optimal i for query x[j] is the line minimizing y at x=x[j]. Maintain these lines as a lower convex hull. Query with a pointer that moves monotonically when queries are sorted.
